description: Uterine tonic, astringent, anti-inflammatory; regulates menstruation and bleeding.
dosage: 1-3 g/day aerial parts or 300 mg extract
legalStatus: Legal in EU and US as traditional remedy; used for gynecological purposes.
therapeuticUses: reduces bleeding and soothes irritated membranes.
